title: Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Youth 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HEARTS WITH A MISSION HEARTS WITH A MISSION MEDFORD YOUTH SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Youth shelter providing temporary emergency shelter for up to 120 days with written parent/guardian consent or 72 hours without written consent. Services for sheltered and unsheltered youth include case management, mentoring, housing search assistance, and counseling services. Bathing facilities, laundry facilities, a clothing closet, and personal grooming supplies are also provided. School supplies are for enrolled participants only. 517 Edwards Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Homeless or at-risk youth ages 10-17 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 646-7385 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES NEW ROADS NEW ROADS DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in center with laundry facilities, phone use, temporary mailing address, showers, and daily meals. Also provides street outreach, case management, mental health counseling, education, and assistance finding housing. Eligible youth will be added to a central housing referral list for all programs they qualify for. 941 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Homeless and at-risk youth ages 16-24 Hours: -Drop-in Center: 7 days per week 8:30am-5pm -Breakfast: 7 days per week 8:30am-9:30am -Lunch: 7 days per week noon-1pm -Snack: 7 days per week 3pm-3:30pm -Dinner: 7 days per week 4pm-5pm Email (541) 686-4310 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET TRANSITIONAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing and help with finding apartments, getting vouchers and subsidies, and connecting to other services. Housing options include The Moxie, a 24-bed facility in downtown Portland; Unity House, for LGBTQ2+; New Doors, for youth transitioning from foster care; New Meadows, a 15-unit community for youth formerly in foster care; and Butterfly House, for youth involved in the sex trade. 1220 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Varies by program; age 25 and under experiencing homelessness or housing instability, with a focus on former foster youth, individuals with disabilities, and LGBTQIA2S+ youth Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 517-3912 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HEARTS WITH A MISSION YOUTH SHELTER LOOKING GLASS COMMUNITY SERVICES NEW ROADS DROP-IN CENTER NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH TRANSITIONAL HOUSING
